scenario_catalog.title: Missing hot paths should fail closed
scenario_catalog.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_bad cargo bench -p asupersync --bench methodology_baselines --features test-internals -- methodology/task_spawn --noplot
scenario_catalog.rch_refresh_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_bad cargo bench -p asupersync --bench methodology_baselines --features test-internals -- methodology/task_spawn --noplot

memory_observations.interpretation: Fixture should still report memory ceiling.

operator_interpretation.recommended_action: Do not accept missing hot paths.
